# Codebase Summary

> **For agents:** Read this file at the very start of every task.  
> It replaces ~5 000 tokens of codebase exploration with ~600 tokens of
> pre-digested facts. The AUTO-GENERATED section is regenerated by
> `scripts/update-codebase-summary.sh` after every epic commit — do not
> edit it by hand. The AGENT-MAINTAINED sections are yours to update.

## Architectural patterns

> **How to update this section:**  
> After implementing an epic that reveals a reusable pattern (a common
> import path, a factory function, a base-class convention), append a brief
> bullet here. Keep each bullet to one line plus one example.  
> Delete stale bullets when a pattern changes.
